title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: tuned bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for tuned is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The tuned packages provide a service that tunes system settings according to a selected profile.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): LVM + cpu-partitioning = broken boot [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-120175)

Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems

full_text:
An update for tuned is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The tuned packages provide a service that tunes system settings according to a selected profile.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): LVM + cpu-partitioning = broken boot [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-120175)
